entry.title: A love time stands still for
entry.summary:
Author: hysterical_light

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,401Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 54

Summary: What if no one is around when Arthur rises from the lake,what if Arthur is left to make his own way, towards the warm feeling guiding his soul.With a knights mindset in the modern world. A fairly sappy warm take on Arthur rising and finding Merlins new life in his little tudor house with his big grey cat

entry.title: the dawn and dusk of halcyon summers
entry.summary:
Author: lancingalot

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,672Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Gwaine is perfectly happy drifting through exam season with his boyfriend and dear friends by his side. Life isn't totally figured out - is it ever? - but they're happy. Content and together and so very whole; and determined to hold onto that contentedness even as life comes knocking, and they start to quickly realise that they might all be destined for different paths.

entry.title: S2: EP 2: EXPOSED ROOTS: THE BOND SERIES
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,507Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Arthur lifted his eyes to the Knight, finally. “Why did you kiss him?” “I already told you. We spoke.” “Of whoring?” “Of choice. And the difference between having one, and having none.” “And he couldn’t come to me,” Arthur sighed sadly. “Not with *that* word in his mind, in his ear. Not knowing the fury it could invoke in you. He didn’t want to hurt you.” “So you kissed him instead, thinking that would hurt less?” Arthur accused harshly. “No, I kissed him so he’d take me seriously. Words weren’t getting me anywhere. The two of you have been fighting this battle for *years*- so they haven’t gotten *you* anywhere, either. I knew it was time to be done with words. And I didn't overly much care at the time how *you* would feel about it. I cared about what *he* needed.” Gwaine chuckled, shaking his head. “He threw me clear across the Garden.”

entry.title: Two Sides Of The Same Coin: The Tale Of The Once And Future King
entry.summary:
Author: L4dyH4rm0n14

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,493Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Everybody inside the walls of Camelot knew of The Great Purge that had happened twenty-two summers hence. 'Tis was the day the Pendragon Reign had fallen to meet its end.Ygraine Pendragon had died giving birth to a child, and Uther Pendragon had been exiled from his very kingdom after admitting defeat against the Dragonlord, Balinor.The very name, Pendragon, had been erased from the records. Never to be remembered, nor spoken of again.*~~*Having grown up in the confines of his small village, Arthur Pendragon has always sought out a better life for him and his father.When Arthur ventures to Camelot in search for honest work, he did not expect to become a knight guarding the prince.*~~*Prophecy has been told by Kilgharrah that Merlin's destiny, the Once and Future King of Albion will rightfully claim the throne as his birthright.

entry.title: The Prince, The Warlock and The Healer
entry.summary:
Author: Heratakescamelot

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,927Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 32

Summary: Hera was just looking for a way to escape her master's thesis and, more generally, the impending collapse of her adult life. She didn't expect the universe to take her so literally that it would hurl her straight into the Sixth Century.Trading academic deadlines for Uther Pendragon’s executioner's block was a trauma, but at least no one in Camelot is asking her if she’s finished her bibliography yet. Hidden away in Gaius’s chambers, Hera tries to navigate a world of ancient stones and fierce laws, where she quickly discovers she isn't just an intruder: she is the catalyst uncovering the unspeakable desires that bind Arthur Pendragon and Merlin to one another.

entry.title: The Space Between Us
entry.summary:
Author: ReyloTrash2187

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 246,611Chapters: 38/38Kudos: 1,229

Summary: Arthur Pendragon has spent his whole life untouched—by kindness, by desire, or anything resembling real intimacy. It never mattered. Not until a certain annoying manservant came to Camelot—Merlin—who disregarded all strict royal etiquette and showed no restraint when it came to sudden, reckless displays of affection. Now, there’s something impossible in the space between them, something Arthur doesn’t know how to name—only that he aches to close the distance. * A slow-burn touched-starved Arthur Pendragon story. * Guys, there was only one bed. Guys, some obscure quest in the cold far-up mountains made them "huddle for warmth". Guys, they might give in to this farm fantasy of theirs. Can't I just put all the tropes in there? This fic is rated MSI for Maximum Self Indulgence.

entry.title: Blind Loyalty
entry.summary:
Author: Shippeoforever

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,753Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 24

Summary: The laws of Camelot are clear: no animal that does not serve for hunting may cross the castle walls. But when the new King Arthur discovers that his closest advisor has defied the rules for a small, snow-white, blind puppy, the destiny of Albion takes an unexpected turn. Amidst secrets shared with the most loyal knights, Morgana's cunning, and the warmth of a love that defies royal decrees, a new law is about to be written... one dictated by the heart.   Note:** Story created with the help of AI, but all ideas are my own. Tags will be added as the story progresses. I should mention that English isn't my first language, so I apologize if there are any spelling mistakes throughout the fanfic. The chapters will be short, I'm warning you now, but that doesn't make it any less of an important story.

entry.title: True of Heart
entry.summary:
Author: SprinkleHatesEverything

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,061Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 35

Summary: "Since that day, magic began to occupy his thoughts more and more. Magic lived on in such a mundane way that Lancelot had a difficult time imagining who exactly it was that Uther had been fighting. Magic was everywhere, magic was in the heart of Camelot itself. Uther was definitely turning in his grave." OR Lancelot Du Lac is a selfless and honourable man with a strong sense of morality. He became a knight to defend and help the people around him. But when he starts to realise that he is complicit to a great injustice, as a feeling of helplessness starts to grip his heart as he watches his magical friend sacrifice himself from the shadows, he realises something needs to change

entry.summary:
Author: Saxifactumterritum

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,631Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Merlin has a thought to do something about that. There is also a crown prince with opaque motivations doing odd things. Part nine of the adventury au I put the gen tag today, because it is a lot of friends in this part. But it is also Merthur, really.

entry.title: Eat the rich
entry.summary:
Author: Ace_Teagirl

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,779Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: The man was exactly like on the photos Gwaine had shown him. Blond with pale blue eyes and a sharp jaw. His smile dug cute dimples in his cheeks. Merlin breathed deeply. In his experience, gorgeous men often had a horrendous personality. But this guy couldn’t be too bad, if he was Gwaine’s friend. “Sorry, I hope I didn’t keep you waiting for too long. I’m Merlin, by the way,” Merlin said with a self-conscious smile and a nervous chuckle. “I arrived just a few minutes ago, Merlin. I’m Arthur.” The way his name rolled off Arthur’s tongue made a shiver run down Merlin’s spine. He wasn’t ashamed of admitting that he really wanted to hear it again. He even found Arthur’s posh accent attractive. Gwen would be cackling when he’d tell her. That was perhaps the first time that Merlin encountered a rich person that he didn’t immediately want to punch.

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,371Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 76

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

  • Good Mordred (Merlin)
  • Nonbinary Character
  • The gods are pricks

entry.title: Merlin’s Other Half
entry.summary:
Author: OnceFutureKing

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 527Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: The once and future king is destined to rise again- one thousand and three hundred and twenty five years later a young couple conceives a baby. Merlin has awaited the return of his beloved for over a thousand years, and it has messed with his head. He has given SO MUCH for his king; now that he has him back, he is not taking any chances.

  • Rape/Non-Con
  • Underage Sex
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Reincarnation
  • Kidnapping
  • Non-Consensual Touching

entry.title: Destiny's Hold
entry.summary:
Author: give_me_a_croissant

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,179Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Starting in the middle of S5E5.Arthur is faced with an impossible decision. Accept the old religion back into his kingdom and save Sir Mordred's life, or continue his campaign against sorcery and condemn the young knight to certain death? After receiving advice from Merlin, Arthur decides to do something that will forever change the fate of Camelot, and hopefully his own destiny.ORWhat if Arthur accepted magic back into his kingdom to save Mordred, and then he quickly finds out that Merlin, who has been by his side through all of this, is a sorcerer himself? How does Arthur's decision with the Disir change his and Merlin's destiny?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin & Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Gwen (Merlin)

  • Leon (Merlin)

  • Merlin's Neckerchief (Merlin)
  • Merlin's Magic Loves Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • starts close to canon with some minor changes

  • they're crushing on each other and it's so obvious hello
  • i'm not sure where this is going yet but i know how it will end

  • and hopefully very dramatic
  • But Also Fun
  • arthur and gwen never fell in love
